title: ID PROJECT - 211info
text: OUTSIDE IN ID PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with changing name/gender through the courts or at the DMV (cannot do both for one person). Services range from providing information on the process of changing documents in the state of Oregon to offering financial aid and advocacy at the courts and the DMV. The level of financial assistance and eligibility for this assistance varies based on program's budget. 1132 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: People who identify as transgender or gender-nonconforming Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 535-3828 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3828 ID Project Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment, which may be booked out as far as one month in advance FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Transgender Individuals Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Transgender Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HOUSING/SHELTER - OUTSIDE IN DAY PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH HOUSING PROGRAM HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRANS CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUTSIDE IN
